development_approach.strategy: Create note file (M3); stage exactly the six M1-listed paths with path-limited git add -- <path> per path; leave commit step to orchestrator via /commit 20260524-123039
development_approach.validation_approach: git show --format= --name-only HEAD lists exactly the six M1 paths and no others; git log -1 --format=%B contains standalone line Task-id: 20260524-123039; cat note file confirms manual git commands, three Gap descriptions from lines 55-106, and /close confirmation text

research_findings.reason: straightforward doc-only cleanup with clear root cause — no pattern research needed

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex confirmed 4 in-scope real bugs in the proposed AC1 rewrite: (1) matcher missed staged-but-uncommitted states (only checked ?? and ' M'); (2) commit-message substring check not causally tied to this dev run — prior auto-bulk commits already contain the task-id string; (3) vacuous pass when invocation-time docs/dev/ was already clean; (4) clean status does not prove committed (could be restore/delete). All four addressed by anchoring on pre_dev_head + full path-limited clean check + NOOP path. Finding 5 was OBSERVATION_ONLY (old AC still in files — expected since BA had not yet applied edits).

findings.issue: AC1 status matcher only checked '?? docs/dev/' and ' M docs/dev/', missing staged states (M  A  D  AM ...)
findings.proposed_fix: Replace with git status --porcelain=v1 --untracked-files=normal -- docs/dev/ returns no output
findings.rationale: Dev could stage files without committing and AC1 would still pass — blocker for correctness

findings.issue: Commit-message substring 'contains 20260524-123039' not causally tied to this dev run; prior auto-bulk commits already contain that string
findings.proposed_fix: Anchor on pre_dev_head; require commit in pre_dev_head..HEAD with body line 'Task-id: 20260524-123039' (exact)
findings.rationale: Without causal anchor, QA could pass on a stale auto-bulk commit that happened to mention the task id

findings.issue: Vacuous pass: if auto-bulk already cleaned docs/dev/ before dev runs, AC1 passes even if dev did nothing
findings.proposed_fix: Make NOOP path explicit: if invocation-time snapshot was empty, dev records NOOP note; no commit required
findings.rationale: Explicit NOOP path prevents ambiguity between 'dev did work' and 'work was already done'

findings.issue: Clean status does not prove committed — could result from restore or delete
findings.proposed_fix: Require commit-range evidence (pre_dev_head..HEAD) not only a clean working tree
findings.rationale: Covered by same pre_dev_head anchor from finding 2

findings.issue: Old list-dependent AC1 still present in files at codex review time
findings.rationale: Expected — BA applies edits after codex review

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All four blocker findings applied: AC1 now uses full path-limited clean check, pre_dev_head causal anchor, Task-id exact body-line marker, and explicit NOOP path for empty invocation snapshot. Round 2 (OBJ-5 response): 3 BLOCKER + 2 MAJOR findings from Codex applied — AC1 rewritten to exact-6-path enumeration; Goal narrowed; Won't Have replaced; M1 revised to remove commit-verb ambiguity; context JSON scope/strategy/evidence fields updated to six-path scope; AC3 given/when/then updated to direct workflow-file check; source range corrected to lines 55-106.
